page.title: Kids Birthday Pirate Yacht Party in Marbella

data.meta_description: Host a kids birthday pirate yacht party in Marbella. Sail from Puerto Banús with a skipper, drinks & snacks. From €749 for 9 guests.
data.summary: A kids birthday pirate yacht party in Marbella combines adventure with luxury. Choose from our fleet, depart Puerto Banús, and enjoy a fully crewed experience with drinks and snacks.
key_facts: Fleet includes Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) and Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax)
Prices from €749 for 2 hours to €2,299 for 8 hours
Licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and Spanish IVA included
Complimentary soft drinks, water, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks
Optional pirate-themed decorations and party packs available on request
Suitable for ages 5–12 with life jackets for all children

faq.q: What is included in a kids birthday pirate yacht party in Marbella?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. Pirate-themed decorations, party packs, and a treasure map can be arranged on request. All children receive life jackets. The price also covers Spanish IVA (21%).

faq.q: Which boats are best for a kids birthday pirate yacht party?
faq.a: For smaller groups, the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, up to 9 guests) or Azimut 39 (12.5m, up to 11 guests) are ideal. Both depart from Puerto Banús and include a skipper. For larger parties, the Mangusta 80 (24m, up to 12 guests) offers more space. Pricing for the Mangusta 80 starts at €4,719 for 4 hours.

faq.q: How much does a kids birthday pirate yacht party cost?
faq.a: Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) cost €749 for 2 hours, €1,049 for 3 hours, €1,299 for 4 hours, €1,799 for 6 hours, and €2,299 for 8 hours. All prices include skipper, drinks, snacks, and VAT. Larger boats like the Mangusta 80 start at €4,719 for 4 hours.

faq.q: Can we bring our own pirate decorations and cake?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring your own decorations, cake, and party favours. We can also arrange a pirate-themed party pack with hats, eye patches, and a treasure map for an additional fee. Please request this when booking.

faq.q: What safety measures are in place for children?
faq.a: All children must wear life jackets while on deck. We provide life jackets in various sizes. The skipper is licensed and experienced. The yacht has safety equipment including fire extinguishers and first aid kits. We recommend children be supervised by adults at all times.

faq.q: Where does the pirate yacht party depart from?
faq.a: All our yachts depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella. The marina is easily accessible by car or taxi. There is paid parking nearby. We recommend arriving 15 minutes before your charter time.

faq.q: What is the cancellation policy for a kids birthday pirate yacht party?
faq.a: Cancellations made 7 days or more before the charter receive a full refund. Within 7 days, a 50% refund applies. No refunds for same-day cancellations. In case of bad weather, we will reschedule or offer a full refund.

faq.q: Can we include a treasure hunt or games on the yacht?
faq.a: Absolutely. We can arrange a treasure hunt with a map and small prizes for an extra fee. The skipper can also help with games like 'pin the patch on the pirate'. Let us know your requirements when booking.

data.body_html:
Looking for a kids birthday pirate yacht party in Marbella that combines adventure with luxury? You've found it. Sail from Puerto Banús on a private yacht, complete with a licensed skipper, drinks, snacks, and optional pirate-themed extras. Whether you choose the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, up to 9 guests) or the Azimut 39 (12.5m, up to 11 guests), your child's birthday will be unforgettable. Prices start at just €749 for 2 hours, including all taxes and crew.

Why choose a pirate yacht party in Marbella?

Marbella's coastline offers calm waters, stunning views of La Concha mountain, and exclusive marinas like Puerto Banús. A pirate yacht party gives kids the thrill of sailing while parents relax. The yacht is private, so no strangers join. You control the itinerary: anchor at Cala del Faro for a swim, or cruise past the Golden Mile. The skipper handles navigation, leaving you free to enjoy the party.

Our fleet for kids birthday parties

We offer two perfect boats for kids parties. Both depart from Puerto Banús and include a skipper, fuel, insurance, and refreshments.

  • Astondoa 40 – 12.5m, up to 9 guests. Ideal for intimate parties. €749/2h to €2,299/8h.
  • Azimut 39 – 12.5m, up to 11 guests. Slightly larger cockpit. Same pricing as Astondoa 40.
  • Mangusta 80 – 24m, up to 12 guests. More space, includes a jet ski. From €4,719 for 4 hours.

For larger groups, the Mangusta 80 (white or grey) offers extra deck space. All boats have shaded areas, a bathroom, and a sound system for music.

Pricing and inclusions

BoatDurationPrice
Astondoa 40 / Azimut 392 hours€749
Astondoa 40 / Azimut 393 hours€1,049
Astondoa 40 / Azimut 394 hours€1,299
Astondoa 40 / Azimut 396 hours€1,799
Astondoa 40 / Azimut 398 hours€2,299
Mangusta 80 (any)4 hours min€4,719

Every charter includes: licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden fees.

Pirate-themed extras

Make the party truly special with optional pirate add-ons. Request pirate hats, eye patches, temporary tattoos, and a treasure map. We can also arrange a treasure hunt with small prizes. Cake and party bags are welcome. Let us know your requirements when booking, and we'll tailor the experience.

Sample itinerary for a 3-hour party

  1. Depart Puerto Banús – Board at the marina, meet the skipper.
  2. Pirate welcome – Kids receive hats and eye patches. Treasure map revealed.
  3. Cruise along the coast – Pass by Marbella Marina and the Golden Mile.
  4. Anchor at Cala del Faro – Swim stop (weather permitting). Treasure hunt on deck.
  5. Snacks and cake – Enjoy drinks and cake in the shaded cockpit.
  6. Return to Puerto Banús – Disembark with party bags.

Safety and logistics

All children must wear life jackets while on deck. We provide sizes for ages 2–12. The skipper holds a valid license and safety certifications. The yacht carries first aid kits and fire extinguishers. We recommend at least one adult per five children. The party is suitable for ages 5–12.

Frequently asked questions

What is included in a kids birthday pirate yacht party in Marbella?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. Pirate-themed decorations, party packs, and a treasure map can be arranged on request. All children receive life jackets. The price also covers Spanish IVA (21%).

Which boats are best for a kids birthday pirate yacht party?

For smaller groups, the Astondoa 40 (12.5m, up to 9 guests) or Azimut 39 (12.5m, up to 11 guests) are ideal. Both depart from Puerto Banús and include a skipper. For larger parties, the Mangusta 80 (24m, up to 12 guests) offers more space. Pricing for the Mangusta 80 starts at €4,719 for 4 hours.

How much does a kids birthday pirate yacht party cost?

Our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) cost €749 for 2 hours, €1,049 for 3 hours, €1,299 for 4 hours, €1,799 for 6 hours, and €2,299 for 8 hours. All prices include skipper, drinks, snacks, and VAT. Larger boats like the Mangusta 80 start at €4,719 for 4 hours.

Can we bring our own pirate decorations and cake?

Yes, you are welcome to bring your own decorations, cake, and party favours. We can also arrange a pirate-themed party pack with hats, eye patches, and a treasure map for an additional fee. Please request this when booking.

What safety measures are in place for children?

All children must wear life jackets while on deck. We provide life jackets in various sizes. The skipper is licensed and experienced. The yacht has safety equipment including fire extinguishers and first aid kits. We recommend children be supervised by adults at all times.

Where does the pirate yacht party depart from?

All our yachts depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella. The marina is easily accessible by car or taxi. There is paid parking nearby. We recommend arriving 15 minutes before your charter time.

What is the cancellation policy for a kids birthday pirate yacht party?

Cancellations made 7 days or more before the charter receive a full refund. Within 7 days, a 50% refund applies. No refunds for same-day cancellations. In case of bad weather, we will reschedule or offer a full refund.

Can we include a treasure hunt or games on the yacht?

Absolutely. We can arrange a treasure hunt with a map and small prizes for an extra fee. The skipper can also help with games like 'pin the patch on the pirate'. Let us know your requirements when booking.

Ready to book a kids birthday pirate yacht party in Marbella? Explore our full fleet and contact us via WhatsApp for availability. We'll help you plan the perfect day on the water.
